one_line_summary: Solid ADR and ambitious scope, but the diff contains syntax-breaking edits (duplicate vars, broken indentation, stub _run_test) that prevent the feature from running.
strengths: Thorough ADR-076 with contract table, alternatives, and risks written before code
Clear six-phase TDDPlanMode skeleton plus CLI flag and /plan tdd slash wiring
README + wiki + help text all updated coherently
weaknesses: runner.py and repl.py have duplicate plan_mode_type assignments and broken indented async-for blocks — files almost certainly won't import
_run_test is hard-coded to return a FAIL string (no real Bash/pytest invocation), so RED vs GREEN isn't actually distinguished at runtime
Tests rely on patching the stubbed _run_test and a Deps signature (swarm=, bash=) that likely doesn't exist; SwarmTool()/TaskTool() instantiated with no args
